name: Irish Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Post Grape Nuts or All Bran Buds
2 1/2 cups sour milk (mix 3 tablespoons vinegar with water)
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam the raisins and let them cool.
2. Mix the dry ingredients together and add the raisins. Stir well until combined.
3. Add the sour milk mixture and egg to the dry ingredients. Combine everything until a smooth batter forms.
4. Pour the batter into two greased loaf pans.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 45 minutes to 1 hour, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the loaves comes out clean.
6. Let cool before serving with butter or cream cheese.
Yield: 2 loaves
